description: Self-serve view of analytics data stored on the device — shows what's been captured this session, with Pause and Clear controls.

attributes.name: compact
attributes.description: Tighter layout for embedding alongside other UI

events.name: analytics-panel:cleared
events.description: Fired after session data is cleared by the user

events.name: analytics-panel:optout
events.description: Fired when the user pauses analytics for this tab

events.name: analytics-panel:optin
events.description: Fired when the user resumes analytics for this tab
